name: @stock-platform/signal-engine
description: Signal Engine - Computes bullish/bearish signals from market data

scripts.build: python -c "import ast, pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('src/main.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); dist = pathlib.Path('dist'); dist.mkdir(exist_ok=True); (dist / 'build.ok').write_text('ok\n', encoding='utf-8')"
